title: Interface contract text-block format may cause cross-module inconsistency
content:
When module count >= 4 and interface contracts are passed as text blocks between ARCHITECT → PLAN → CODE stages, there is a risk of contract drift. Example: module A declares getUser(id: string) but module B implements getUser(userId: number). If this pattern recurs 3+ times, implement structured InterfaceContract storage with programmatic dependency checking. See: workflow/docs/pending-optimizations.md#2-interface-contract-structured-storage

title: File lock missing in JSONL EventStore causes silent data corruption risk under concurrent access
content:
T-08 AC-5 required file lock for concurrent JSONL/index writes but it was not implemented. Under single-process IDE Agent use, this is safe. However, if Phase 3 facade (state-machine.js) is accessed by multiple Node.js processes, concurrent append() calls could corrupt index.json or produce interleaved JSONL lines. Fix: add proper-lockfile before Phase 3 integration. Also: sessionId path traversal defense-in-depth is missing — add validation to reject sessionId containing /, \\, or .. characters.

--- Distilled Knowledge ---

title: [BlindSpot] Socratic blind spots not consumed by downstream stages
content:
PLAN-stage Socratic questioning identified 3 blind spots (Q1: line estimate verification via git diff, Q2: T-3 injection point assumption, Q3: formatConversationWithBudget compatibility). None were structurally consumed by CODE stage. Root cause: Socratic output is free-text, not structured verification points. CODE stage only reads execution-plan.md task list, not Socratic review output. Fix: Convert each blind spot into a structured VerificationPoint in execution-plan.md with checkbox format. CODE stage must check off each VP. TEST stage must gate on all VPs consumed. Evidence: Q1 (git diff --stat) was never executed during CODE; Q2 assumption was wrong but correction not recorded; Q3 compatibility only implicitly proven by tests passing.

title: 验证层检查器执行顺序：phenomenon必须先于paramRanges
content: 在实现多检查器验证管道时，检查器的执行顺序至关重要。paramRanges检查器会对非法值进行auto-clamp（如折射率0.3→1.0），如果先于phenomenon检查器运行，会掩盖原始错误，导致phenomenon检查器看不到CRITICAL条件。正确顺序：phenomenon（检查原始值）→ paramRanges（修正值）→ formulas（验证公式）→ dimensions（量纲检查）。

title: 声明式渲染器扩展：ElementType + RENDERERS 映射同步更新
content: 扩展 ElementType 联合类型时，必须同步更新 RENDERERS: Record<ElementType, typeof renderRect> 映射，否则 TypeScript 会报 missing key 错误。新增渲染器函数时，所有 number|string 类型的字段（如 amplitude、wavelength）需要用 typeof 检查或 resolveDynamicValue 解析，不能直接用 ?? 默认值参与算术运算。
